exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query:
SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(O.OwnerId,'#','')) as agent_id, SUM(I.Quantity * I.UnitPrice) as total_sales
FROM "Order" O
JOIN OrderItem I ON TRIM(REPLACE(O.Id,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(I.OrderId,'#',''))
WHERE O.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND O.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY agent_id
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(O.OwnerId,'#','')) as agent_id, SUM(I.Quantity * I.UnitPrice) as total_sales
FROM "Order" O
JOIN OrderItem I ON TRIM(REPLACE(O.Id,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(I.OrderId,'#',''))
WHERE O.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND O.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY agent_id
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 1;
